name: xdm_flat_icon_overlay
description: Replaces the legacy XDM artwork with a modern flat icon across the app window, tray, executable, raster/vector assets, and Linux package integration.
commitMessage: Replace XDM icon with modern flat artwork
constraints: Apply on top of commit d9c9756
Use one consistent icon design for window, tray, executable, and Linux launcher packaging
Preserve transparent rounded corners and flat colors
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Do not change application behavior or persistence formats
